case_title: JOHN HUDSON et al VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AND BANK OF AMERICA AND NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO LA SALLE BANK, AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATE SERIES 2006-AR'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS EXCEPT BANK OF AMERICA BECAUSE THE CASE AS TO THEM IS BARRED BY RES JUDICATA. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BANK OF AMERICA IF PLAINTIFF'S CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH FACTS SUPPORTING LIABILITY ON THE PLEADED CAUSES OF ACTION AS TO BANK OF AMERICA BASED ON SOMETHING OTHER THAN BANK OF AMERICA BEING A SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO THE PARTIES IN THE PRIOR LAWSUIT. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY FILING FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO LASALLE BANK, N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE PASS- THROUGH CERTIFICATE SERIES 2006-AR1
